title: Mark All as Read as a Button rather than Context Menu
excerpt:
Marking things as read is a frequent activity and it should be a single button click rather than hidden within a context menu, especially since notifications are not automatically marked as read.

posts.author: megamorphg (Med)
posts.cookedHtml:
Marking things as read is a frequent activity and it should be a single button click rather than hidden within a context menu, especially since notifications are not automatically marked as read.

Also, “delete all” should not be right next to the choice in the same menu (can be disastrous).
